timeline_intro.copy: A 20-years journey of elegance, where intensity and sensuality blend to create an unforgettable The One fragrance experience.

products.title: The One for Men EDP
products.copy: A fragrance that stands out for its sophisticated, authentic masculinity. Radiant and intense.

products.title: The One for Men Gold EDPI

male.desc: Your aura moves before you do, a silent force that draws every gaze.

fragrance.title: The One for Men
fragrance.desc: A timeless icon, reborn. Crafted for the man of distinction, it reveals deeper nuances of elegance, power and allure.

female.desc: Your aura radiates quiet elegance and confidence, turning simplicity into uniqueness.

fragrance.title: The One
fragrance.desc: A timeless icon, reimagined with radiant depth. Created for the woman of grace, it reveals elegance, confidence, and an allure that endures.

male.desc: Your aura lingers beyond the moment, a quiet depth people will never forget.

fragrance.title: The One for Men
fragrance.desc: A richer, more intense interpretation of The One. It unveils depth and sophistication, embodying strength and timeless elegance with every encounter.

female.desc: Your aura lingers softly. A magnetic mystery that stays long after you’ve gone.

fragrance.title: The One
fragrance.desc: A bold yet refined expression of femininity. It captures the essence of a confident woman. Graceful and unforgettable.

male.desc: You speak only when it matters. Your aura whispers power, drawing others in effortlessly.

fragrance.title: The One Men
fragrance.desc: This fragrance embodies the natural confidence of a man whose charm leaves a lasting, unforgettable impression to people.

female.desc: You speak only when it matters. Your aura whispers power, drawing others in effortlessly.

fragrance.title: The One
fragrance.desc: A timeless icon, reimagined with radiant depth. Created for the woman of grace, it reveals elegance, confidence, and an allure that endures.

male.desc: Your aura commands the room. Unforgettable, leaving the silence charged with presence.

fragrance.title: The One Gold for Men
fragrance.desc: A celebration of modern masculinity and magnetic allure. It reflects inner power, elegance, and the unmistakable brilliance of a man who stands apart.

female.desc: You’re never afraid to shine. Your fierce aura lights up the room the moment you walk in.

fragrance.title: The One Gold
fragrance.desc: A tribute to luminous femininity and inner power. It celebrates the woman who owns her elegance and irresistible charm.

items.copy:
The birth of an icon,
bold vision of femininity

data.value: Same signature, now even more long-lasting, even more captivating. It's a timeless icon gets reimagined, with ah enhanced fragrance that reveals new olfactory depths, crafter for a refined men with an elegant, distinctive character. A blend of intense, sophisticated, and instantly recognizable notes.

items.title:
The One for Men
Eau de Toilette

data.value: Charming and sensual, like the men who wears it, this fragrance makes an unmistakable impression with its utterly charismatic blend of basil notes, bewitching lavender, and sandalwood accords.

items.title: The One for Men Eau de Parfum
items.copy:
A bold revolution
of the original
eau de toilette

data.value: Same signature, now even more long-lasting, even more captivating. It's a timeless icon gets reimagined, with ah enhanced fragrance that reveals new olfactory depths, crafter for a refined men with an elegant, distinctive character. A blend of intense, sophisticated, and instantly recognizable notes.

items.title:
The One Gold
Eau De Parfum Intense
items.copy:
A bold revolution of
the original eau de toilette

data.value: The ultimate expression of elegance and femininity. It is a celebration of the independent and captivating women, featuring a luminous and enchanting olfactory blend of Plum, Rose, and Jasmine.

It is synonymous with style and magnetic charm. This unique masculine essence pays homage to the magnetic allure of its wearer, featuring a captivating blend of woody and spicy notes, including Clary Sage, Bergamot, and Patchouli.

items.title:
20 years later.
a new chapter of the story unfolds.
